description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:1.63.0-slim-bullseye Docker image. Define a rustfmt job that runs rustup component add rustfmt, then cargo fmt -- --version, then cargo fmt -- --check. Define a test job that runs rustc --version && cargo --version, then cargo build --verbose, then cargo test. Both jobs run in the default test stage with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
